title: Fix standalone grep no-match exit code
description: Bug: In execPipeline() line 188-189, standalone grep with empty output (no matches) gets exitCode 0 via exitCodeFor(''). The pipe case (lines 113, 180) already handles this correctly: (cmd === 'grep' && output === '') ? 1. Apply same logic to standalone path. Fix: extract command name from trimmed input before execSingle(), then apply grep no-match check for exitCode.
